title: [Production] image-processing-worker OOMKilled - Critical Memory Exhaustion
description: The 'image-processing-worker' pod 'image-processing-worker-xyz12' in production was terminated by the Kubernetes OOM killer. This indicates severe memory exhaustion, likely due to a memory leak or inefficient resource usage. The service has been restarted, but underlying issue needs immediate investigation.

title: High Error Rate: inventory-service experiencing 5xx errors
description: The inventory-service is experiencing a high rate of 5xx responses, likely due to database connection acquisition timeouts caused by a recent traffic spike. Investigate database performance and connection pool settings.

title: High Latency & Errors in Checkout Service
description: The checkout-service is experiencing high latency and 'context deadline exceeded' errors when communicating with the payment-gateway. This is likely due to an upstream issue with the third-party payment provider, which is taking over 10 seconds to respond.

title: Auth Service v2.1 Deployment Failed - CrashLoopBackOff
description: The new deployment of auth-service (v2.1.0) is experiencing continuous CrashLoopBackOff states across all pods. Application logs indicate 'Failed to parse configuration: invalid JSON format at line 5, column 12'. This is severely impacting user authentication and dependent services.

title: High Latency & Timeouts in User Profile Service (Database)
description: The user-profile-service is experiencing severe database query timeouts and high latency. This is likely due to an upstream cache failure (Redis) causing a thundering herd problem on the user-db, leading to connection pool exhaustion.
